steps.title: Identify the embedded question
steps.content: The blank follows “investigate how,” creating a question within the larger sentence about what the team investigated, not a direct question being asked.

steps.title: Apply the embedded-question rule
steps.content:
Embedded questions use normal word order (not question inversion) and end with a period as part of the main sentence, not a question mark.

Choice B satisfies both requirements with normal word order and period punctuation.

The other three either invert the word order, use an incorrect question mark, or both.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
